title: make-hello-c test fails on armel
body:
Debian's CI for verilator/5.030-2 faults on armel doing make-hello-c
https://tracker.debian.org/pkg/verilator
https://ci.debian.net/packages/v/verilator/testing/armel/55575533/
(but passes on seven other arches!)
```
obj_dir/Vtop
Vtop: /usr/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:97: VerilatedEvalMsgQueue::VerilatedEvalMsgQueue(): Assertion `atomic_is_lock_free(&m_depth)' failed.
```

Much better than the pre-issue-#3891 days, eh?  But still enough to get verilator kicked out of Debian, if it's not resolved soon.

I can try digging in a little, but I don't have access to a real armel machine.  Maybe I can get something running on qemu?
Posting now, in case an actual arm expert can help out faster than me.
